name: codex-account-switcher
description: Switch between multiple Codex CLI auth accounts with cdx switch

scripts.test:smoke: node -e 'const { spawnSync } = require("node:child_process"); const r = spawnSync(process.execPath, ["bin/cdx.js"], { encoding: "utf8" }); const out = (r.stdout || "") + (r.stderr || ""); if (r.status !== 1) process.exit(1); if (!/interactive terminal required/i.test(out)) process.exit(1);'
scripts.test: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:regressions
